mnemonics: Snoopy Snoops on Shared Caches (to maintain cache coherence)
keyPoints: Cache coherence ensures all processor caches have a consistent view of shared memory.
Snoopy protocols broadcast cache operations (like read, write, invalidate) on a shared bus.
Write-invalidate is a common protocol where a write forces other caches to invalidate their copy of the data.
commonMistakes: Assuming a write-back cache automatically handles coherence (it requires a specific protocol).
Forgetting that false sharing (unnecessary sharing of cache lines) can severely degrade performance.
